description: Exceptionally maintained executive corner townhome in prestigious Azure West! Rare 2,600 sq.ft. end unit with extra windows, abundant natural light and added privacy, offering a detached-home feel. Spacious 2-storey with basement layout featuring 3 bedrooms, rec room and 4 baths. Bright open living areas, hardwood floors and a gourmet kitchen with granite counters. Brand new kitchen appliances (range hood, dishwasher, oven & French-door fridge), all approx. 1 year old. Sunny private patio, fenced yard and side-by-side double garage. Prime South Surrey Grandview location, walking distance to parks, top schools and shops. Perfect for families!Perfect for families!
